SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:53am
Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant appears through attorney Ross Madden and son Morgan Thomas. Respondent, Sarkis Khanzadian appears in Pro Per.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Sleight.
